about.title: About Me
about.bio1: Hi, I'm JiaTao Yin (尹家韬). An independent creator focused on self-improvement, one-person business, and product growth.
about.bio2: I believe everyone has the potential to become a super individual. Through continuous learning, practice, and sharing, we can break through the boundaries of traditional careers and create our own lifestyle.
